calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/Adjudication -
Motion for summary judgment is granted. Plaintiff met its initial burden by submitting evidence proving each element of the open book account and account stated causes of action. (Plaintiff's Undisputed Material Facts, 1-18.) Defendant does not raise a triable issue of material fact. First, Defendant's separate statement in opposition does not comply with CCP sec. 437c(b)(3), which requires that each disputed fact "shall be followed by a reference to the supporting evidence." Second, Defendant's declaration, the only evidence submitted in opposition, cannot be considered, as it is not executed under penalty of perjury. (See Kulshrestha v. First Union Comm. Corp. (2004) 33 Cal.4th 601, 608.) Defendant's objections to the Declaration of Linda Salas are overruled. The Declaration establishes that Ms. Salas is a custodian of records. (Salas Declaration, pars. 1-2.) ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =302/ehg

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Continued To Mar-19-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARYJUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION is continued to March 19, 2015. Moving party did not provide a complete courtesy copy of the moving papers. Moving party did not provide a courtesy copy of any of the exhibits that are apparently supposed to be attached to Linda Salas' Declaration. Moving party must deliver a complete courtesy copy of Linda Salas' Declaration by 4:00 pm on March 16, 2015, or the motion will be denied. The Court has courtesy copies of the rest of the moving papers, the opposition papers, and the reply papers. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Continued To Mar-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION is continued to March 16, 2015 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 25, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
